subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! The tempests of trials have fiercely intensified, and the winds of sedition have grown mighty throughout all regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد اشتدت زوابع الامتحان و قویت اریاح الافتتان علی جمیع الارجاء و
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God
